key.name: mode
key.description: Simple Mode shows the calm Things-3-style surface; Builder Mode adds the Inspector pane, Forecast, Review, and Perspectives. Flipping mode is a UI re-render only — the database is never touched (spec §3.1, "Mode-as-View").

key.name: window-width
key.description: Width of the application window in pixels.

key.name: window-height
key.description: Height of the application window in pixels.

key.name: window-maximized
key.summary: Whether the window was maximized at last close

key.name: sidebar-width
key.description: Width of the navigation split view's sidebar in pixels.

key.name: quick-entry-shortcut
key.description: Accelerator that opens the Quick Entry capture modal. Phase 6 binds this; declared here from Phase 3 so the value persists across versions. GTK accelerator syntax — e.g. "<Control>n".

key.name: high-legibility-font
key.description: When enabled, swaps the UI font from Inter to Atkinson Hyperlegible — a typeface designed by the Braille Institute for low-vision readers, with high inter-letter distinguish- ability. Bundled (SIL OFL 1.1) so the toggle works with no system fonts required. Phase 8c.

key.name: vault-path
key.description: Absolute path to a directory holding `.org` files that Atrium projects its data into (Phase 16, spec §7.3). Empty string means "no vault configured" — Atrium runs DB-only, which is a valid configuration. Convention is `$HOME/Tasks/`. The Settings → Org Vault → Choose folder UI to manage this lands in Phase 19.5; the `--vault PATH` CLI flag overrides for this session.

key.name: notifications-enabled
key.description: When enabled, Atrium fires `gio::Notification` for time-based reminders (`task.reminder_at`). When disabled, the reminder service stays running but suppresses every notification. Phase 19.5 (v0.20.0).

key.name: theme
key.description: One of "auto" (follow system Adwaita), "light", or "dark". v0.20.0 — Phase 19.5 preferences foundation. The Adwaita style manager already auto-tracks system scheme; this key exists for users who want to pin one regardless of system setting.

key.name: backup-weekly
key.description: When enabled, Atrium writes a timestamped database snapshot to `$XDG_DATA_HOME/atrium/backups/` at launch if the newest existing snapshot is more than seven days old, keeping the newest ten. Off by default; manual "Back up now" works regardless. v0.32.0 — Phase 19.5.
